evals.name: intro-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the intro section (AE, SE, Deal Type, Next Call, Next Call Agenda) renders with each field on its own line, not collapsed into a single paragraph.
evals.expected_output:
HTML output has
tags between each bold-label field in the intro paragraph. AE, SE, Deal Type, Next Call, and Next Call Agenda each appear on separate visual lines.

assertions.name: intro-fields-have-linebreaks
assertions.description:
The intro section (AE/SE/Deal Type/Next Call) must have
tags between consecutive bold-label lines. At least N-1 breaks for N fields.

assertions.name: empty-csm-removed
assertions.description: The CSM field is empty in the fixture and should be removed entirely, not rendered as a blank label.
assertions.check:
HTML must NOT contain 'CSM:' followed by only whitespace before the next
or

evals.name: meddpicc-summary-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the MEDDPICC summary callout renders each field (Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, etc.) on its own line.
evals.expected_output:
The blockquote after the MEDDPICC heading has
tags between each bullet field. Each '- **Field:** value' item appears on a separate line.

assertions.name: meddpicc-callout-has-linebreaks
assertions.description:
MEDDPICC summary blockquote must have
tags between the 8 MEDDPICC fields (Metrics through Competition). At least 7 line breaks expected.

assertions.name: no-collapsed-bullets
assertions.description: No bullet items should be collapsed together (pattern: 'value - <strong>' without a preceding line break indicates collapsed items).

evals.name: techmaps-summary-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the TECHMAPS summary callout renders each field on its own line.
evals.expected_output:
The blockquote after the TECHMAPS heading has
tags between fields. Technical Requirements, Environment, Competitors, Hero, Metrics, Alignment, Plan, and Support each appear on separate lines.

assertions.name: techmaps-callout-has-linebreaks
assertions.description:
TECHMAPS summary blockquote must have
tags between fields.

evals.name: com-summary-linebreaks
evals.prompt: Preprocess the test fixture and verify the Command of the Message summary callout renders Before/Pain/Required/After on separate lines.
evals.expected_output:
The blockquote after the Command of the Message heading has
tags between the Before, Pain, Required, and After fields.

assertions.name: com-callout-has-linebreaks
assertions.description:
CoM summary blockquote must have
tags between the 4 fields.
